name: Ukupakisha Inxeba Le-Hemostatic
description: Ukupakishwa kwesilonda esingacindezeli noma esihlanganayo nge-hemostatic gauze ukulawula ukopha lapho i-tourniquet ingeke isetshenziswe khona.
steps: Don amagilavu. Veza isilonda ngokugcwele usebenzisa izikele zokuhlukumezeka.
Khomba umthombo wokopha osebenzayo ngaphakathi kwesikhala senxeba.
Vula i-hemostatic gauze bese uyipakisha iqine enxebeni ngomunwe wakho, uyiphushele ngqo emthonjeni wokopha.
Qhubeka nokupakisha kuze kube yilapho imbobo yesilonda isigcwele ngokuphelele.
Faka ingcindezi eqondile, eqhubekayo ngesithende sesandla sakho okungenani imizuzu emi-3.
UNGAKUSUSI noma yikuphi ukupakisha uma sekusetshenzisiwe.
Faka ibhandishi lokucindezela phezu kwesilonda esigcwele.
Maka isikhathi ekhadini le-TCCC noma esiphongweni sesiguli (isb., 'PKD 0145').
warnings: UNGApakishi amanxeba angena esifubeni -- sebenzisa i-chest seal esikhundleni salokho.
Uma upakisha inxeba lentamo, faka ingcindezi ngaphandle kokucindezela womabili ama-carotid ngesikhathi esisodwa.
Phinda uhlole phakathi nemizuzu emi-5 uma kusolwa umthombo we-arterial.

pediatric.note: Sebenzisa i-gauze encane ngokulinganayo. Faka ingcindezi elula ukuze ugweme ukucindezelwa kwe-thoracic ezinganeni.

obstetric.note: Gwema ukucindezela kokupakisha okujulile noma okunamandla eduze kwesisu se-gravid. Ukukhuphuka okusheshayo kuyakhethwa.
